title: Pentagon identifies six US service members killed in aircraft crash over Iraq
summary_full: US Central Command says crash followed unspecified incident, and second refueling tanker landed safely in IsraelThe names of the six US service members who died when a military refueling aircraft crashed over Iraq on Thursday have been released.The Pentagon on Saturday identified the crew members as Maj John “Alex” Klinner, 33, of Auburn, Alabama; Capt Ariana Savino, 31, of Covington, Washington; Tech Sgt Ashley Pruitt, 34, of Bardstown, Kentucky; Capt Seth Koval, 38, of Mooresville, Indiana; Capt Curtis Angst, 30, of Wilmington, Ohio; and Tech Sgt Tyler Simmons, 28, of Columbus, Ohio. Continue reading...
